notes: Large one-time settlement of $21,341,364 recorded in Other Revenue dramatically inflates 2023 figures. Auditor firm name not clearly stated — signed as Chartered Professional Accountants, Licensed Public Accountants in Fort Frances, Ontario. Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Mishkosiminiziibiing Development Corporation and Big Grassy LP. Net book value of tangible capital assets calculated as closing cost $43,292,629 less accumulated amortization $25,561,693 per schedule — using net book value 2023 of $25,561,693 from TCA schedule ($20,644,677 + $4,916,528 - $1,281,278 approx). Actual net book value per statement of changes is $17,730,936 opening plus acquisitions less amortization. Schedule shows 2023 net book value $25,561,693. Deferred revenue balance $7,748,341 at year end. Change in accounting estimate reduced accounts payable by $1,085,146 in current year. No schedule of remuneration provided.
